name: WhatsApp Archive
description: Archives all WhatsApp messages with full-text and semantic search

dataDir.description: Directory for database and media files (default: plugin data/ dir)

enableEmbeddings.description: Enable semantic/vector search via OpenAI embeddings (default: true)

mediaDownload.description: Download and store media files locally (default: true)

allowFrom.description: Phone numbers allowed to use search tools (default: owner only)
